user_story: As a Manager, I want to view an employee time off summary filtered by year, so that I can review time off balances for a specific period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Summary screen; When I select a year and click Search; Then the summary is displayed for that year

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter the summary by department and employee name, so that I can focus on a particular employee or team
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Summary screen; When I select a department and employee name and click Search; Then the summary shows only matching employees

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see time off credits, leaves taken, scheduled time offs and balance per time off type, so that I can understand each employee's remaining entitlement
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Summary screen; When results are returned; Then each row shows time off credits, leaves taken, time offs scheduled and balance time offs

user_story: As a Manager, I want to view pending approval and loss of pay time off figures, so that I can track outstanding and unpaid leave
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Summary screen; When results are returned; Then each row shows pending approval, pending loss of pay and approved loss of pay time off values

user_story: As a Manager, I want to toggle between active and inactive employees, so that I can include or exclude former employees from the summary
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Time Off Summary screen; When I select Active Employees or Inactive Employees; Then the summary reflects the chosen employee status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset my filters, so that I can clear the summary criteria and start again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Employee Time Off Summary screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters return to their default values
